  • Method Details

    • createRow

      public UsmMIB.UsmTableRow createRow(org.snmp4j.smi.OID index, org.snmp4j.smi.Variable[] values)
      Description copied from class: DefaultMOMutableTableModel
      Create a new row and return it. The new row will not be added to the table. To add it to the model use the DefaultMOMutableTableModel.addRow(R) method. If this mutable table does not support row creation, it should throw an UnsupportedOperationException.
      Specified by:
      createRow in interface MOTableRowFactory<UsmMIB.UsmTableRow>
      Overrides:
      createRow in class DefaultMOMutableTableModel<UsmMIB.UsmTableRow>
      Parameters:
      index - the index OID for the new row.
      values - the values to be contained in the new row.
      Returns:
      the created MOTableRow.

    • getIndexDef

      public MOTableIndex getIndexDef()
